problem id: 9077fa09
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) OR SHR(3)

examples:
  10100011 -> 11111100
  00110000 -> 00001110
  01000100 -> 00011001
  10000001 -> 01110000
  01101101 -> 01011111
  01100111 -> 11011101
  01111011 -> 11011111
  01100001 -> 01011100
  01000000 -> 00011000

query: 11100101
predicted answer: 01111101
